title: Kimi-K2-Thinking Model Card
citation: Moonshot AI. Kimi-K2-Thinking model card. Hugging Face. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Planning source for rejecting Kimi-K2-class models as a laptop-local default and for considering Kimi-style reasoning only as a future on-prem or hosted provider option.
claims_supported: The Kimi-K2-Thinking card describes a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with 1T total parameters and 32B activated parameters.
The card lists a 256K context length and modified MIT license.
The card recommends deployment through engines such as vLLM, SGLang, and KTransformers.
claims_not_supported: That Kimi-K2-Thinking is feasible on this 64 GB laptop.
That Kimi should be used without model-governance and hardware-cost review.
